perks.summary: MAFFT multiple sequence alignment (unaligned FASTA -> aligned FASTA)
IQ-TREE 2 maximum-likelihood tree with automatic model selection + ultrafast bootstrap (aligned FASTA -> Newick treefile)
FastTree fast approximate ML tree for large datasets (aligned FASTA -> Newick tree)
ETE3 tree statistics: taxa count + total/mean/max branch length (Newick tree -> JSON)
ETE3 rooted-tree render to PNG with Newick fallback (Newick tree -> PNG)
